articles.title: Yesterday IPL Match Result: Delhi Capitals hunt down 211-run target vs Punjab Kings, keep hopes alive
articles.description: Delhi Capitals pulled off a stunning three-wicket chase of 211 against Punjab Kings in Dharamshala after slipping to 74/4. Axar Patel and David Miller revived the innings before Ashutosh Sharma, Madhav Tiwari and Auqib Nabi sealed victory. Earlier, Priyansh Arya starred with a blazing 56, but Punjab’s strong start ended in disappointment.

articles.title: NFL Trade Rumors: Los Angeles Chargers and Chicago Bears linked to former All-Pro wide receiver
articles.description: Former All-Pro wide receiver Deebo Samuel has emerged in fresh NFL trade rumors linking him to the Los Angeles Chargers and Chicago Bears. After recording 72 catches, 727 yards, and five touchdowns with the Washington Commanders in 2025, Samuel continues to draw interest from playoff contenders searching for another offensive weapon. The Chargers could reunite him with offensive coordinator Mike McDaniel, while the Bears may view the veteran as another versatile piece for Caleb Williams and Ben Johnson’s rising offence ahead of the 2026 NFL season.
